member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ContentControlNavigator
member.summary: ContentControl을 기반으로 ViewModel에 대응하는 View를 표시하는 기본 네비게이터

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.RegionBinderHelper
member.summary: Finds WPF region controls registered through .

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.RegionBinderHelper.FindRegionControl(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.String)
member.summary: Searches the visual tree for a with the specified region name.
member.param: The root visual to search from.
member.returns: The matching content control, or null when no match exists.

member.name: T:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ViewModelBinder
member.summary: Provides WPF helpers for automatic ViewModel binding and View resolution.

member.name: F:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ViewModelBinder.AutoWireViewModelProperty
member.summary: Attached property used to automatically assign a ViewModel to a View DataContext.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ViewModelBinder.GetAutoWireViewModel(System.Windows.DependencyObject)
member.summary: Gets whether automatic ViewModel binding is enabled.
member.returns: True when automatic binding is enabled; otherwise false.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ViewModelBinder.SetAutoWireViewModel(System.Windows.DependencyObject,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Sets whether automatic ViewModel binding is enabled.
member.param: True to resolve and assign a ViewModel automatically.

member.name: M:Dreamine.MVVM.Locators.Wpf.ViewModelBinder.ResolveView(System.Object)
member.summary: Resolves the View that corresponds to the specified ViewModel and assigns the ViewModel as DataContext.
member.exception: Thrown when no matching View type can be found.
